item.title: Adobe Plaster Coal Forge Build
item.description: Adding adobe plaster to a coal forge for insulation and durability, improving heat efficiency and traditional blacksmith shop construction.

media:content.media:title: Adobe Plaster Coal Forge Build
media:content.media:description: Adding adobe plaster to a coal forge for insulation and durability, improving heat efficiency and traditional blacksmith shop construction.

item.title: Black Pipe Candle Holder Build
item.description: Creating a candle holder from black pipe, showing simple metalworking techniques to produce a functional and decorative forged piece.

media:content.media:title: Black Pipe Candle Holder Build
media:content.media:description: Creating a candle holder from black pipe, showing simple metalworking techniques to produce a functional and decorative forged piece.

item.title: Building a Tenon Spring Die
item.description: Fabricating a tenon spring die for blacksmithing, covering design, forging, and finishing steps to create a precision shop tool.

media:content.media:title: Building a Tenon Spring Die
media:content.media:description: Fabricating a tenon spring die for blacksmithing, covering design, forging, and finishing steps to create a precision shop tool.

item.title: Hand-Carved Ram's Head Hook
item.description: Hand-carved ram's head hook showcasing detailed woodworking craftsmanship, blending function and decorative design into a unique handmade piece.

media:content.media:title: Hand-Carved Ram's Head Hook
media:content.media:description: Hand-carved ram's head hook showcasing detailed woodworking craftsmanship, blending function and decorative design into a unique handmade piece.

item.title: 25 Pound Power Hammer Build
item.description: Building a 25-pound power hammer for metalworking, showcasing fabrication, welding, and mechanical assembly for heavy-duty forging tasks.

media:content.media:title: 25 Pound Power Hammer Build
media:content.media:description: Building a 25-pound power hammer for metalworking, showcasing fabrication, welding, and mechanical assembly for heavy-duty forging tasks.

item.title: Iron Hand Forged Metal Build
item.description: Forging a detailed iron hand sculpture, highlighting metal shaping, heat work, and precision craftsmanship in a unique blacksmith project.

media:content.media:title: Iron Hand Forged Metal Build
media:content.media:description: Forging a detailed iron hand sculpture, highlighting metal shaping, heat work, and precision craftsmanship in a unique blacksmith project.

item.title: How to Make a Forged Froe
item.description: Step-by-step forging process to make a traditional froe, covering shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques for practical woodworking tools.

media:content.media:title: How to Make a Forged Froe
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step forging process to make a traditional froe, covering shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques for practical woodworking tools.

item.title: Braided Twist Blacksmithing Demo
item.description: Blacksmithing demonstration of braided twist metalwork, showing heating, twisting, and shaping techniques to create decorative forged patterns.

media:content.media:title: Braided Twist Blacksmithing Demo
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing demonstration of braided twist metalwork, showing heating, twisting, and shaping techniques to create decorative forged patterns.

item.title: Forged Coffee Scoop Making
item.description: Blacksmithing process for making handcrafted coffee scoops, featuring shaping, forging, and finishing techniques for a functional kitchen tool.

media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process for making handcrafted coffee scoops, featuring shaping, forging, and finishing techniques for a functional kitchen tool.

item.title: Forging a Simple Bottle Opener
item.description: Step-by-step blacksmithing project to forge a simple bottle opener, covering heating, shaping, and finishing a durable handmade tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Simple Bottle Opener
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step blacksmithing project to forge a simple bottle opener, covering heating, shaping, and finishing a durable handmade tool.

item.title: Simple Steel Identification Tests
item.description: Basic methods for testing and identifying unknown steels, including heat response and spark testing to help determine material properties in blacksmithing.

media:content.media:title: Simple Steel Identification Tests
media:content.media:description: Basic methods for testing and identifying unknown steels, including heat response and spark testing to help determine material properties in blacksmithing.

item.title: Decorative Chisel Set Forging
item.description: Blacksmithing process for creating a decorative chisel set, including forging, shaping, and finishing custom tools with detailed metalwork craftsmanship.

media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process for creating a decorative chisel set, including forging, shaping, and finishing custom tools with detailed metalwork craftsmanship.
